ERRORS.CONTEXT LOST: WebGL context lost. Please reload the page. Probably your image is too large.
ERRORS.ERROR WHILE SAVING: Error while saving image. Please try again. Probably your image is too large.
ERRORS.ERROR WHILE CREATING TILES: Error while visualizing the image. Please try again. Probably your image is too large.
ERRORS.GL NOT AVAILABLE: Your browser does not support WebGL. Please use a different browser.
ERRORS.IMAGE TOO LARGE: Sorry, but your image is too large. Max supported size of our system on your PC is {{maxTextureSize}}px in each dimension. Your image is {{imageWidth}}x{{imageHeight}}px.

IMAGE EDITOR.RETOUCHING WARNING: Click into the panorama and draw a polygon around the area you want to blur. Complete the selection with a double-click. After clicking Save, the blurring will be processed server-side and will be visible in approximately 2-3 minutes.
IMAGE EDITOR.RETOUCHING UNSAVED CHANGES: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to delete them?
IMAGE EDITOR.RETOUCHING START: Your pixelation is being processed by our servers. The result will be available to all users in a few minutes.
IMAGE EDITOR.RETOUCHING ERROR: An error occurred while processing the image pixelation.

MEASUREMENT.AGREEMENT: I am aware that dimensional deviations may occur during the beta test phase. Nevertheless, I would like to activate the 360° tour with dimensions and accept the associated restrictions
MEASUREMENT.CALCULATED NODALHEIGHT: The following nodal point height is automatically taken from the specified reference measurement
MEASUREMENT.REVERSE: In order to perform a measurement within Ogulo, we need a suitable reference value. This is usually composed of the camera height (nodal point). If you do not know the height of the nodal point, we can easily calculate it based on your reference measurement. To do this, please correct the value of your measurement. If you do not know the measurement of the reference measurement, we ask you to use a measurement that you can easily determine, e.g. door width/height, bed, window or similar.
MEASUREMENT.REFERENCE TOO BIG: The reference measurement is too big
MEASUREMENT.REFERENCE TOO SMALL: The reference measurement is too small
MEASUREMENT.SPECIFY MEASUREMENT: Please enter the correct value of your reference measurement made earlier
MEASUREMENT.NODALHEIGHT TOO BIG: The nodal height is too big
MEASUREMENT.NODALHEIGHT TOO SMALL: The nodal height is too small
MEASUREMENT.WARNING: Info: The dimensions shown may differ from the actual dimensions on site. Horizontal measurement is only possible on the floor. Vertical measurement must start on the floor.
MEASUREMENT.WARNING 2: The adjustment is made exclusively for the selected position.

WRONG FILE TYPE.TITLE: Wrong Input File
WRONG FILE TYPE.DESCRIPTION: One of the files you intend to upload is not one of the permitted file types (JPG, PNG). Please check and try again.

FILE TOO BIG.TITLE: File too big
FILE TOO BIG.DESCRIPTION: One of the files you intend to upload is larger than 50 MB. Please check the files and try again.

INCORRECT ASPECT RATIO.TITLE: Incorrect Aspect Ratio
INCORRECT ASPECT RATIO.DESCRIPTION: One of the files you intend to upload has a wrong aspect ratio. The required aspect ratio is 2:1. Please check and try again

STAGING.HEADLINE: Staging
STAGING.ORDER STAGING IMAGE: You don't have an after staging image yet? Order now.
